summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CuratedCloset NEW features - all specified functionalities working perfectly
passed_tests: 2-line body copy shows exact required text: 'Be independent. Get your own CuratedCloset' and 'Grow & monetize your activity.'
Page visit tracking - POST /api/track-visit endpoint works (backend confirmed)
Admin login page loads when visiting /admin
Wrong password ('wrongpassword') shows error message correctly
Correct password ('curatedcloset2025') grants access to admin dashboard
Analytics cards display total visits (7), subscribers (2), and conversion rate (28.57%)
Subscriber table displays correctly with email and date columns
Export Excel button is enabled and clickable when subscribers exist
Delete subscriber functionality works - buttons are clickable and functional
Mobile responsive layout works perfectly on 390px width
All UI elements visible and functional on mobile view
Email subscription works on mobile devices
Admin navigation between landing and admin pages smooth
All backend API endpoints working (100% success rate - 11/11 tests passed)
